message:
feat: implement auto-managed credential watcher daemon

- Add fsnotify dependency for filesystem watching
- Create watch-credentials subcommand (hidden from help)
- Auto-start/stop credential watcher daemon on container runs
- Mount separate .credentials.json files per container
- Sync credentials across containers via keychain (macOS) or host file (Linux)
- Prevents credential sharing conflicts between host and containers
- Anti-recursion with timestamp checking
- Auto-exits when no containers running
